sections.paragraph:
Original: טבע

Transliteration: ṭâba‛

Phonetic: taw-bah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sink, sink into, sink down, pierce, settle down, drown, be settled, be planted
    1. (Qal) to sink, sink down
    2. (Pual) to be sunk
    3. (Hophal) to cause to sink

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 789

Part(s) of speech: Verb
